lastReleaseMessage: docs: archive overnight bar-raise + canonical-audit reports (06-29 through 07-03)

barRaise.topFinding: v1 stays healthy and unchanged in code; this pass folds in one new LOW documentation-drift finding. Zero code commits landed after the 2026-07-04 full fan-out (only commit since is the report archive 9497361), and today's canonical audit independently found zero doc-vs-code drift at v1.0.1. All four hard rules re-verify green (D-002 strip server.mjs:308/:437, D-003 bind :140/:155/:514, D-004 no package.json, D-006 stdin :333/:454). New finding: the CLAUDE.md Release flow section still names push-to-github.ps1 when release.ps1 has been the canonical entry point since 2026-07-01 (16a2f09); both scripts work and both write the dashboard, so nothing breaks - stale primary-command docs, LOW, already queued as handler-audit-2026-07-05-agents-release-cmd-stale. The release.ps1:6 carriage-return LOW persists. Health holds at 94; no immediately-actionable HIGH or MEDIUM work is open.

deferred.title: README License line still reads TBD; pick a license for the clone-and-run direction.

openFindings.finding: CLAUDE.md Release flow names push-to-github.ps1 instead of the canonical release.ps1 (since 16a2f09).
release.ps1:6 usage comment carries a carriage return in the path (.\scripts + CR + elease.ps1).
